-- 1 of 25 --

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
2
About the Launch Sequence
This is the moment you first make your product available for sale.
You’ve shifted beliefs, built anticipation, and generated commitment throughout your segmentation, con-
firmation, and pre-launch sequences, and now it’s time to invite them to take that simple next step into a
reality that’s fully aligned with the possibility you’ve created together.
Even in the case of a webinar funnel (where you’ll launch on the webinar itself), I encourage you to send out
a dedicated “launch email” later in that day as well.
This makes sure that:
1. 	People who either didn’t sign up, or signed up for the webinar (but didn’t show up)
get notified in a powerful way
2. 	People who attended (but didn’t buy), get a prompt and powerful follow up that
re-acquaints them with the reasons they should invest now.
What we’re “Coaching”
1. 	Progress and sustained momentum
2. 	Rome is still burning (and it’s been burning forever) - extend the
consistency principle into the indefinite past.
3. 	A natural but urgently necessary next step (instead of a giant leap)
4. 	Coach action buy coaching against procrastination
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 25 --

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
3
The Fast-Action Bonus
The role of the fast action is to both get an initial surge of sales as well as to act as
a “cart close light” for the non-action takers.
By getting them to feel the sting of FOMO a few days before the FINAL cart close,
we’re in turn coaching them against inaction.
The fast-action bonus should be:
• 	Something that can help them achieve the outcome quicker
• 	Offer Real World Value
• 	Non-Scaleable (authentic scarcity)
Questions to Explore:
1. 	From Direct Response 2.0 Workbook:
2. 	What is the main *magic wand* moment or outcome your product can deliver?
3. 	Why is this important to your prospect? Or, why is it what they REALLY need?
4. 	One level deeper, WHY does that matter?
5. 	And if you can go even deeper, why does THAT last one matter?
6. 	What new opportunities will arise as a result? (how do we frame this a push goal, that opens
them up to new favorable possibilities. Connecting this outcome to OTHER wants).
7. 	What other intangible or unexpected problems does buying your product solve?
ie. Freeing them from “the search”
ie. Confidence to double down - knowing that they’re getting an ROE (return on effort)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 25 --

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
4
8. 	What are the 4 Levels of Benefits they’ll experience using your product:
LEVEL 1 (Immediate/Tangible)
LEVEL 2 (Immediate/Emotional)
LEVEL 3 (Long-Term/Tangible)
LEVEL 4 (Long Term/Emotional)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 4 of 25 --

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
5
For the Anti-Launch
Launch Themeplate:
1. 	What micro-actions have they ALREADY taken that you can hold them consistent to?
How are they already in the process?
2. 	In what ways is “Rome Burning” for them? How has it been burning for long before
you came along?
3. 	How will your prospect be in a worse position if they buy in a few days? (what will the
fire have already consumed between now and then? What benefits are they leaving on
the table?)
4. 	How have they been trying (and struggling) to put out the fire?
5. 	How is a product “launch” disingenuous to you? What proprietary elements have been
in development/testing/being proven for months or years?
6. 	What results or case studies can you point to?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 5 of 25 --

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
6
For the “Aladdin” Themeplate
1. 	What’s the “Minimum Viable Commitment”?
2. 	What’s the quickest and most valuable outcome your product can provide?
3. 	For each of your features/benefits - add the “Magic Carpet Ride Moment” which is the
hyper-specific, positive and vivid REAL-LIFE result that accompanies the benefit.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 25 --

7
Themeplate 8
The “Calm Before” aka
The Never-too-Early
Ultimatum (MVF 6)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 25 --

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
8
ABOUT:
To be sent the night before opening your cart.
The goal of this email is to re-affirm your prospect’s commitment either explicitly
(they clicked on the YES I’m still interested link)...
Or implicitly (they DIDN’T click the “remove me” link).
It’s an opportunity for your prospects to give themselves a gut check and see where
they stand in relation to you and your offer.
It’s also meant to ramp up the trust and intimacy factor in the moments leading to
the cart open (where you’ll need it most).
THEMEPLATE:
[Build intimacy/connection]
[Announce that your program is going live the next morning]
[Very quickly touch on the pain they’ll escape from]
[Just a quickly - foreshadow and reinforce the big outcome]
[CTA 1- Ask them to RE-CONFIRM interest]
[Incentivize the re-confirmation with the mention of a fast action bonus]
[CTA 2 - Briefly remind them of the value you’ve given in the pre-launch]
[Give them an “escape link”]
[Sign off]
EXAMPLE
Subject:
10:49 pm. Lower East Side. (action needed ASAP)
Body:
10:49pm here in the lower east side.
Kinda wish I was back home with the fam right now.
Always more fun to launch these things with loved ones
nearby.
But alas - the cheap hotel room bubbly and Leonard Cohen
playlist will have to do ;-)
Create a sense of intimacy with
your audience by writing this in
REAL TIME - filling them in on your
current state.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 8 of 25 --

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
9
Should probably shut it down and prep for our big day, but
had to reach out real quick before the melatonin kicked in
and shuttled me off into some weird, smokey reverie.
As you already know, tomorrow I’ll be opening up the doors
to the brand new, Coaching The Conversion Certification
Program…
And when I do…
You’ll finally have a chance to ditch all those high-pressured
sales tactics and persuasion tricks that up to now you were
convinced were just the unfortunate table stakes for surviv-
ing the online marketing game.
And instead…
Dramatically grow your revenue (up to 2X in 90 Days) sim-
ply by better leveraging the things you’re already great at:
Coaching, educating, leading, and showing your prospect
greater empathy than anyone else had previously dared.
*Cheers to that, Ryt*
But here’s what I need you to do first.
If you’re still serious about this…
Would you mind re-confirming that to me over here.
It would mean a lot…
(as well as give you first dibs on a special fast-action
bonus I’m putting together for the first 10 sign ups)
On the other hand…
Very briefly remind them of the
pain they’re moving away from
Just as briefly, remind them of
their new outcome.
Words like “still” and “re-confirm”
subtly hold them accountable to
their previous commitment (the
initial opt-in).
Give an incentive, but DON’T give
away what the bonus is. The curi-
osity loop is part of the incentive
to stay on board for the launch
announcement.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 9 of 25 --

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
10
If you were just along for the ride, got some AWESOME value
along the way, yet TRULY feel it’s time for you to step off
(and it ain’t just the fear talking)...
Then here’s your chance to remove yourself from the private
launch list.
No harm. No foul.
Either way - tomorrow’s a big one for both of us.
So for now…
Hug a loved one for me. Sip something nice and slow.
And I’ll catch you in the early AM with your important next
steps :)
Peace, Love & Rock’n’Roll
Ry
Advanced Implementation Note: The “YES - reconfirm
me” link can land on a special page that gives your prospect
advanced access to your program before EVERYONE else (as
well as an extra “night before” bonus).
This leverages a sense of surprise/discovery as well as ex-
clusive empowerment (they’re empowered by stumbling on
this secret late night backdoor link).
A genuine invitation to exit the
launch list. Giving them the “out”
will build trust and make you feel
good about emailing frequently
in the days to come. Also, if they
DON’T jump ship here (and most
won’t due to loss aversion).. they’re
ostensibly confirming interest.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Themeplate 9
The Anti-Launch
Launch

pack)

-- 11 of 25 --

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
12
ABOUT:
Use this template to announce the “cart open” of your launch.
It serves as a major pattern interrupt from the typical launch hype that makes it a “big deal”, and instead,
gets your prospect face-to-face with the stakes, and positions the “big deal” more about the fact that they
can now escape it.
THEMEPLATE:
[announce that the offer is now live]
[social proof and/or a core benefit of the product]
[bridge into WHY it’s not an actual “launch”]
[Rome is Burning moment - what’s burning - how are they trying to extinguish?]
[Describe the existing context/problem as SPECIFICALLY as you can]
[Remind them that the fire has been burning long before you got there]
[Why it’s not a launch for you (credibility + proof + case studies)]
[Call out a negative trait (ie. procrastination) + hold them consistent to a higher standard]
[CTA - which shows naturalness - continuation - small step]
[Remind them of cost of waiting. What will be left of Rome?]
[CTA 2]
[Optional: use the PS to disarm 1 or 2 key objections]
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 12 of 25 --

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
13
EXAMPLE
Subject:
10X Emails is LIVE (but don’t call it a “launch”)
Body:
In case you missed it, we just opened the doors to our 10x
Emails Course.
An awesome crowd of growth-minded marketers, entrepre-
neurs and copywriters have already punched its one-way
ticket to email glory.
(The Team Plan has made that really affordable for bigger
groups. You’ll see it here)
Those fine folks are set to start generating revenue from the
first few lessons alone.
And the templates!
We almost never offer templates ‘round these parts.
We’d rather teach you to fish than hand you a templated
fish.
But we’ve got 4 email copy templates for you in 10x Emails.
Four templated emails based on emails we’ve written
that’ve brought in five figures with a single send. Four tem-
plates doesn’t sound like a lot? Well it’s a drop in the bucket
of awesomeness that is 10x Emails. And it really only takes
one solid email send to cover your investment fast.
(Challenge for you: try popping the “Upgraded FAQ” email
into your existing drip sequence and NOT getting New Sale
notifications pronto-tonto. Truly.)
And while 10x Emails might just be the best thing we’ve ever
shipped at Copy Hackers…
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 13 of 25 --

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
14
To call it a “launch” would be nothing short of blasphe-
mous.
To you.
To us.
To the email marketing overlords who watch over your
every move deciding if THIS is gonna be the day YOU finally
have a major revenue breakthrough.
(Hint: it could be)
Cause here’s the thing...
Nothing has actually “launched.”
Here’s what I mean by that...
>>> You’ve already been hard at it, struggling to achieve just
a sliver of those paydays, launches and user upgrades you
keep reading posts about.
>>> You already have a subscriber list (or a client’s list) (or
a list of trial users) that’s ready to be profited from. The
struggle is transforming that list of watchers into a list of
customers. What aren’t you telling them that they need to
hear? Why does it seem so easy for other businesses... and
so damn hard for yours?? Is there something wrong with
your list? Or something wrong with your offering?
And…
>>> You already own or work for an early or growth-stage
business that needs to maximize the ROI of every asset if
it’s going to hit those lofty benchmarks everyone agreed
to on that Google Hangout two weeks ago... back when it
all seemed so simple... back before you actually tried to,
y’know, generate revenue...
See? Nothing has launched for you.
You’re knee deep in it.
And on our side...
Exclusive empowerment
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
15
YES, it’s true that this is the first time we’ll be putting many
of these strategies and templates on display outside of our
private 1-on-1 client work…
But nothing has launched here either.
>>> The strategies and techniques you’ll learn inside 10x
Emails have all been rigorously tested and proven broadly.
To be clear: we’ve used them for our business AND for our
clients in ecommerce, SaaS, high-end consulting services,
B2B, B2C. We’ve tested ‘em. Made mistakes. Corrected
mistakes. Brought in 3.5x lift. All that good stuff you expect
from Copy Hackers.
>>> The templates you’ll use to crank out your highest-con-
verting sales emails ever (seriously - and in half the time it
takes you to painfully squeeze out the low-converting stuff)
have been hard at work generating hundreds of thousands
of dollars for private clients.
>>> And the live implementation workshops you’ll get to
attend next month have been meticulously planned and
engineered for this outcome: so you can walk away with the
WRITTEN emails that can literally 10x your investment in
10x Emails the second you hit “send.”
So YES.
While you’ll now have access to EVERYTHING you need to
turn email into that powerful, low-cost lever... the one that
can help you put money in the bank and hire people and
upgrade your laptops and buy the unbranded versions of
your favorite software and splurge on grande frappuccinos
for your whole crew....
Nothing. Has. Launched.
Cool?
Glad we could get that all cleared up.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
16
When you’re ready, here’s your chance to take everything
you’re ALREADY doing, and make it up to 10X more profit-
able.
~Jo
P.S. In spite of the rumors, email marketing does not come
down to dumb luck.
Nor does it come down to One Size Fits All.
It’s about learning and applying a proven, repeatable set
of email copywriting techniques - that’s the difference
between emails that convert and emails that, like, induce
Unsubscribe Whiplash.
(That’s what happens when your email copy is so wrong
your subscriber can’t move fast enough to the unsubscribe
link. Not to be confused with Keyboard Face, where your
dull-dull-dull email copy knocks your subscriber into a su-
per-slumber right at her desk.)
Proven. Repeatable. Set of techniques. That creates awe-
someness.
That’s what we’re talking about in 10x Emails.
ALL ZEE LESSONS - none of that slow burn nonsense
- are waiting for you inside the 10x Emails Members area.
Enroll now and I’ll shoot you over your login within 90 sec-
onds.
P.P.S. “Training Program” is also a total misnomer.
The goal of 10x Emails isn’t to cram you full of concepts and
jargon that make you look 5% smarter at your next market-
ing conference.
(If you wanna look smart, just name drop Eugene Schwartz
every chance you get. Done.)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
17
The goal here is much more direct:
To arm you with the high action techniques that you can
put to work (and profit from) IMMEDIATELY.
Know what to write. Why you’re writing it. And how to make
it killer.
No messin’ around.
No going through a 50-hour, Costco-sized video library.
Most of our videos are about 5 minutes long, actually.
We all too busy 10x’n.
P.P.P.S. If you have:
An underperforming email rotting away in your drip se-
quence
A product or service your subscribers NEED to believe in
Someone that keeps hinting you’re not quite cut out for the
job of generating revenue with email (I totally worked with
that guy once)
A client you really wanna WOW the crap out of
A boss that would be faaar more likely to lay down a bigger,
better bonus for you if you brought in faaar more revenue
and made it look easy
Or an investor you want to show some phenom growth
reports to
Then every minute you spend *waiting* to join the su-
per-affordable 10x Emails program is another minute you
could’ve been doing this: writing and sending the email that
gives your CFO a special tingly feeling.
Time to make ’em all happy. :-)
Enroll in 10x Emails Today

-- 18 of 25 --

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
19
ABOUT:
In the case of a minimum viable launch (aka no webinar, sales video, or sale page), you’ll need to spice up
the “anti-launch launch” email with a few extra ingredients that allow it to stand alone without a sales page.
I also recommend checking out Modules 6 and 7 as we borrow elements of the “Sales” and “Closing” subse-
quence for this template.
Here, we use the “magic carpet ride” method to give your prospect a vivid walkthrough of your program’s
main features and benefits in an evocative way that allows them to project themselves forward and really
“see” themselves participating in those outcomes.
The point is to NOT make this about “consuming information” about your offer, but instead, have them con-
sume the vision of what their life will look like using your program.
THEMEPLATE:
[Offer Now Live]
[Don’t call it a launch]
[high level outcomes they’ll achieve]
[Rome is Burning moment - Including the Moment of Highest Tension]
[Why it’s not a launch for you (credibility, proof, testimonials, case studies)]
[Program Walkthrough + Value Stack]
[The Offer - including surface level urgency or scarcity]
[Challenge prospect to achieve the QVW - quick and valuable win]
[Position against alternative]
[MVC Close]
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 19 of 25 --

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
20
EXAMPLE
Subject: 10X Launches is LIVE (... but don’t call it a “launch”)
Body:
10X Launches is now LIVE…
But plz, plz, plzzzzz…
For the love of all that is good and furry.
Don’t call it a launch.
Cause here’s the thing…
Even though you now have the ability to…
… solve your “funnel execution crisis” for good without
having your profits held hostage by a top copywriter’s avail-
ability... or your own “a little xanax in my latte won’t kill me”
anxiety around a blinking cursor.
… clear away the biggest bottleneck between you and
those game-changing, 5 and 6-figure product launches and
funnels that fill your entrepreneurial heart with envy.
… and do it all in a way that ditches the needless com-
plexity around crafting high-converting launch copy… and
instead, leverage and optimize your existing shkills as a
coach, educator, trainer or expert.
Nothing has actually “launched”.
You’ve already been at it.
>>> Creating amazing courses, and plunking down on every
program or software to hit the market thinking “this will be
the one” that leads me to my big breakthrough.
>>> Quickly realizing that all those funnels and systems
you’re buying into, as cool as they are, are all held together
High level outcomes/
promises of course
Rome is burning. The more specific
you are in describing the “moment
of highest tension” the hotter the
flame, and the more urgency you’ll
build to escape them.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
21
by this special connective tissue thing we call “copy”.
And…
>>> Doing everything in your power to make it work. Waking
up at 5am to read a dusty book written by some guy who
died 50 years ago instead of that Tim Ferriss tome taunting
you on your night table, stalking fb groups and interrogat-
ing your online friends with FBI-level intensity trying to
uproot someone competent enough to do it for you, and
spinning your wheels as that mega funnel that was sup-
posed to launch you into industry-wide stardom gets rele-
gated to backburner (aka. never gonna happen) status on
your Trello dashboard.
Whew. That’s a mouthful :)
And on our end.
Nuthin’s launched either.
>>> The execution strategies you’ll learn have been hard at
work generating millions of dollars (said it an evil voice) for
private clients in the online education and coaching spaces.
“Email copy is FOUNDATIONAL to everything you do to grow
your business, including list building, product promotion,
and webinars.
Most business owners and entrepreneurs are leaving money
on the table by not improving the way they sell in email.
Ry has a special ability of knowing how to craft email mes-
sages that are relatable, believable and provoke the emo-
tions that move people to action. If you get the opportunity
to learn from Ry, DO IT.
His work inside my business has resulted in thousands of
new subscribers, higher webinar show up rates, and a dra-
matic increase in overall sales.”
- Amy Porterfield, Online Marketing Strategist & Trainer
If you’re not pointing to a sales
letter, you’ll want to include your
BEST testimonial or case study
within the email itself.

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
22
>>> The “themeplates” you’ll plug into your funnel have
been battle-tested and carefully refined to act as a fine-
ly-tuned switches that kill your iPhone 7 battery from a
ceaseless stream of SamCart or Paypal notifications. .
<IMAGE>
22 Proven, High-Converting “Themeplates”
And…
>>> All these materials gone through alpha, beta, theta and
omega testing with other copywriters, online entrepreneurs
and course creators to make sure the “get your ROI in a day”
promise isn’t just hot air - but available to anyone with an
awesome product to sell and a Pomodoro timer.
So with all that said...
Here’s how we’re going to make sure you get your high-
est-converting launch copy out the door faster, into the
world, and pulling revenue on autopilot as you strut
through the Starbucks door with middle-fingers in the air
and your coffee still warm:
WHAT’S INSIDE 10X LAUNCHES
#1: 3 “Core” Modules that reveal in full detail the “Coaching
The Conversion” method, and how to leverage a new, more
empowering definition of “direct response” that opens up
the floodgates to greater intimacy, empathy, and conver-
sions with your audience.
Real-Life Value: $599
#2: 5 “Launch” Modules breaking down every single phase
of your launch in full detail (including some you didn’t even
know existed).
You’ll learn exactly what’s at play during the Segmenta-
tion, Confirmation, Pre-Launch, Launch, Sales and Closing
just as specificity heats up the
flames and agitates pain - being
hyper-specific about the outcomes
will amplify desire.
Product Walkthrough: You can
either go “module by module” or
use a more compact version that
summarizes the core phases/sec-
tions of your program.
Always double check for the “so
what” factor when writing the
features of your product’s compo-
nents. Everything has to tie back to
a strong benefit.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

Real-Life Value: $997

“plug’n’play”, “swipe and deploy” stuff that shoehorns your
message into lifeless boxes that rob it of all life and power.

and 7-figure launch campaigns so that you can craft your

coffee’s still hot.

ment on the spot. Test it).

features, you wont to “show them
their world” future pacing needs
to be built in so that they feel less
like they’re consuming information
- and more like they’re watching
their new reality play out on a
screen.
The “Magic-Carpet Moments” are
about presenting the “so what” in
a vivid way that they can totally
ground within the context of their
reality. The closer the benefits
match the familiar - the easier it is
to make that frictionless next step.
add surface level urgency

24
I want to offer you a little challenge:
Take about 30 minutes tomorrow (or any of the 59 DAYS af-
ter tomorrow) and write up one of “themeplates” you’ll find
waiting for you in your membership area.
Hit send.
If you feel like you didn’t get an instant ROI paired with a
glowing sense of …
“OMG, I can do again tomorrow - and the next day - for
every campaign or funnel - and generate enough automat-
ed revenue to hire a team, build more products, and spend
more time on sandy beaches and my “zone of genius”) …
Then kindly shoot us an email with the subject line “WTF”
and we’ll refund every dollar so that you’ll only need an
extra $18,000 to hire a top copywriter to do the same work
for you.
Cool?
Click here to take the 60 day “10X my ROI” challenge
How copywriting has changed over the last few years, and
how to take full advantage of those recent shifts in your next
launch. (hint: as your software gets smarter, so must you)
The *sneaky* 4-part email sequence that took less than 2
hours to write and brought in an extra 150K+ in revenue on
a client’s webinar launch.
Why most people get their closing sequence all wrong (OMG
12 hours left!!), and what to do instead in the final minutes
of your product launch to lead more prospects across the
finish line.
One of the USP’s of this program is
that it doesn’t take 8-12 weeks and
100’s of hours to get results.
We leverage this as the FVW (fast,
valuable win)
Can you ask yourself - what’s the
crunchiest and most valuable win
(or escape from pain) your program
can provide?
Vividly build up the emotional
response in a specific way. It’s not
just “you’ll feel amazing” instead.
unpack the actual CONTENT of
what “amazing” looks like.
Position against the alternative.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 24 of 25 --

Launch WORKBOOK
MODULE 5
25
Launch Checklist
Have I coached the prospect on:
• 	Why previous efforts fell short?
• 	Why it wasn’t their fault?
• 	The “sacred cows with sour milk” that sabotaged their success or delayed progress?
• 	Why they should feel renewed hope/optimism that they can do it “this time”?
• 	Why they can trust me to help them succeed this time?
• 	2 or 3 Major “ahas” or “insights” that now make the desired outcome feel REAL
and even PROBABLE.
• 	The danger in looking elsewhere (ie. how the rest of the industry/competitors are
still preaching a flawed approach)
• 	Do they feel privy to a big secret that the rest of their competitors aren’t?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 25 of 25 --
